不错不错杀伐果断不圣母这方面和泽哥有的一拼，文中也有乐子不压抑，不舔收nv果断👍🏻，目前没啥毒点，希望后面保持

 末世降临，囤物资？不好意思，我开局无限物资！建安全屋？不了，我有系统加持房屋！
 天灾之下，秩序崩塌，人性、兽性交织，一瓶水能让校花低头，一个鸡腿能让美艳邻居上才艺！
 当别人打生打死，为了丁点物资以命相搏时，林峰早就衣食无忧了。
 当别人收了几个小弟，拿着冷兵器好勇斗狠之时，林峰有了武器库+身体强化。
 …
 出小区以后，就更离谱了，画风也渐渐不对劲……
 看着美女环绕，顿顿山珍海味的林峰，其他求生者们人都麻了！
 不是，槅门！
 家都成美女窝了，你管这叫求生？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9ecbb814f3a506a919c14c9fad98c6f2","author":"顾流觞","author_id":"","book_id":"7502283561827847230","book_name":"末世降临：你无限物资女仆成群？","book_short_name":"求生神级反派","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#989898","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7503570118811583001","read_count":"99431","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1155432"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"551","tags":"科幻末世,系统,穿越,末世,多女主,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6d61191fc5d5052cfb883b97f27a3611~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779431207&x-signature=Oru8zfPgsNAaXZEJI75Hu%2FNfIZA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3227815965105367","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"366"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314264620CBC5633A3816FD2CFB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"lis
